subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Covenant and Testament! Thy numerous letters have been received
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی عهد و پیمان نامه های متعدد از آنجناب رسید و مضامین کل سبب فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
